author: lOrm
content:
Plan: 
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/pipeline.rs — B1 retry loop, B2 thinking budget, B3 tool accumulation, B6 stream timeout, B5 needs_followup
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/session/task.rs — task CRUD and dependency invariants  
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/session/mod.rs — session lifecycle, cumulative usage
- Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to src/proxy.rs — extract_usage_from_sse_event, extract_usage_from_response, determine_provider, normalize_base_url
- Add tests/pipeline_integration.rs — B1 SSE retry via wiremock (no live network)
Each test pins current (broken) behavior with explicit comments citing gap issues. No production code changes.
